opening_line: Mister operator? Mommy won't wake up. Can you send someone? Please? I don't like the hallway.
notes_for_player: Child voice flagged as synthetic. Figure on CAM moves wrong.

questions.label: Ask location
questions.response: Outside 3C. The door is open. It's cold.

questions.label: Ask appearance
questions.response: I'm small. I'm wearing my red coat. Why are you asking so many questions?

questions.label: Ask timeline
questions.response: A long time. Or a second. You're wasting time, operator.

questions.label: Request camera check
questions.response: Don't look. Don't— ...look if you have to.
